instruction: Classify the insurance claim description into its claim type.
baseline_prompt: You are an insurance claims router. Classify the insurance claim description into its claim type. Classify into one of these categories: auto_collision, property_fire, water_damage, theft, liability, medical.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: My teenage son was driving my sedan when he lost control on the wet road and slid into a guardrail. The entire passenger side has scrapes and dents from the front fender all the way to the rear quarter panel. The right side mirror was torn off completely.

I woke up to the smell of burning plastic around 3 AM and discovered that an electrical malfunction in our kitchen had caused flames to spread up the wall behind the refrigerator. The cabinets are completely charred and there's black residue covering the ceiling and adjoining dining room.

Heavy rainfall last week caused our roof to leak significantly. Water came through the ceiling in multiple rooms, staining and warping the ceilings, and now there's visible mold growing on the walls in our master bedroom.
Woke up this morning to discover my bicycle was taken from my garage overnight. It was a custom road bike worth around $2,500. The garage door was left open accidentally and now it's gone.

While renovating my kitchen, my contractor accidentally cut through a water pipe that flooded my downstairs neighbor's apartment, ruining their hardwood floors and furniture. The neighbor is demanding I cover all replacement and restoration costs.

My daughter suffered a severe allergic reaction to a bee sting while at summer camp. She required immediate epinephrine administration and was kept overnight for observation. The attending physician recommended follow-up visits with an allergist.

I was stopped at a traffic light when the car behind me failed to brake in time and rear-ended my vehicle. The trunk won't close properly now and the rear bumper is cracked. I also have some neck pain from the sudden impact.

My tenant called to report that a candle left unattended in the bedroom caused the curtains to ignite. The resulting flames damaged the window frame, scorched the walls, and created extensive smoke staining throughout the second floor of the rental property.

The washing machine hose disconnected while we were at work yesterday, and water sprayed everywhere for hours. The laundry room floor is ruined, and the water seeped into the adjacent hallway and living room, damaging the hardwood floors and baseboards throughout.

My husband's wallet was pickpocketed on the subway during rush hour this morning. It contained his credit cards, driver's license, and about $150 in cash. We've already canceled the cards but need to file this claim.

My tree fell onto my neighbor's garage during a storm, causing significant structural damage to their roof and crushing their motorcycle that was parked inside. They are holding me responsible for the repairs to both the building and the vehicle.

Patient was transported by ambulance to the emergency room after falling from a ladder at work. X-rays revealed a fractured tibia requiring surgical intervention. Total hospital stay was four days including post-operative care and physical therapy consultations.

I misjudged the clearance while pulling into my garage and scraped the entire right side of my car against the garage door frame. There's a long deep scratch from the front wheel well to the back door and the paint is stripped down to bare metal in several places.

A lightning strike during last week's storm ignited our detached garage. By the time firefighters arrived, the entire structure had collapsed and both vehicles inside were totally destroyed along with all our stored belongings and tools.

Our basement is completely flooded after the main water line broke during the night. There's about three inches of standing water covering the entire floor, and the carpet and drywall are soaked through. We need emergency assistance to pump out the water and assess the structural damage.

test.query: Package containing a new smartphone was taken from my front porch yesterday afternoon. I have doorbell camera footage showing an individual in a blue hoodie grabbing it and running off around 2 PM.

A guest slipped on ice on my driveway during a holiday party and broke their wrist. They went to the emergency room and now their medical bills are over $8,000. They are requesting compensation for their injuries sustained on my property.

I developed severe respiratory distress and chemical burns to my throat after inhaling toxic fumes from a cleaning product spill at the facility. I spent three days in the ICU on oxygen therapy and continue to require bronchodilator treatments and pulmonology appointments.

During yesterday's hailstorm, another driver swerved to avoid debris on the freeway and sideswiped my car. We exchanged information at the scene. My vehicle has scratches and dents along the right side and the side mirror housing is broken.

Our historic farmhouse suffered major damage when embers from a nearby brush fire landed on the wooden shake roof and ignited it. The attic is completely gutted and there's substantial charring and heat damage to the second-floor bedrooms.

Our hot water heater failed and leaked continuously over the weekend. The utility room is soaked, and the water spread under the tile into the kitchen, causing the subflooring to buckle and creating significant damage to the cabinetry.

I returned home from vacation to find my back door kicked in and several items missing from my house including jewelry, a television, gaming console, and some cash I had in a drawer. The police have already filed a report.

A delivery person tripped on a crack in my sidewalk and injured their knee badly enough to require surgery. Their employer is claiming I am responsible for maintaining safe conditions and is pursuing payment for the worker's compensation claim they had to file.

During the company picnic, an employee sustained second-degree burns on both hands when a grill malfunctioned. Paramedics provided on-site treatment before transferring him to the burn unit where he received specialized wound care and pain management.

A deer jumped out in front of my SUV on Highway 42 last night around 9 PM. I tried to brake but couldn't avoid impact. The front end is smashed including the hood, grille, and headlights. The radiator appears to be damaged as well since fluid was leaking.

Our warehouse on Industrial Boulevard sustained severe damage last night when flames engulfed the entire eastern wing. The blaze destroyed approximately 15,000 square feet of inventory storage, melted the metal roofing structure, and left heavy soot throughout the undamaged portions of the building.

The toilet supply line ruptured on the second floor while we were away on vacation. Water cascaded down through the bathroom floor into the rooms below, destroying ceilings, walls, furniture, and electronics in multiple areas of our home.

My storage unit was broken into sometime over the weekend. The lock was cut off and they made off with power tools, camping equipment, and several boxes of collectibles. I'm estimating about $4,000 in losses.

I was hosting a barbecue and one of the deck boards on my porch was loose. A friend stepped on it and fell through, injuring their ankle. They missed two weeks of work and are seeking compensation for lost wages and medical treatment.

Claimant reports ongoing neck and back pain following a workplace incident three months ago. She has completed twelve sessions of chiropractic treatment and her physician has now referred her to an orthopedic specialist for further evaluation of potential disc herniation.

I was driving through the intersection when another vehicle ran the red light and hit my car on the driver's side door. The impact caused significant damage to the left quarter panel and both doors on that side. The airbags deployed and my vehicle had to be towed from the scene.

We're filing a claim for our commercial building after a malfunctioning HVAC unit on the roof caught fire early Sunday morning. The flames burned through the roofing membrane and caused significant structural damage to the support beams and insulation.

After the storm, our gutters overflowed and water pooled against the foundation, seeping into the crawl space. Now we have standing water under the house and moisture damage to the floor joists and insulation.
